package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for get_raw_data_then_should_bindjson_duplicate_body: Gin handlers that read GetRawData() and later bind JSON from the same request body.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule315NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule315NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule315NegativeRecord) (Rule315NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario315Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule315NegativeService, input Rule315NegativeRecord) (Rule315NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule315NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
